attacking_style: Explosive attacks in final 1-3km of mountain finishes, often in oversized gears. Opportunistic, willing to exploit mechanicals and tactical moments even against unwritten rules.
team_tactics: Frequently operates isolated without domestique support in critical moments. Astana provided limited protection, leaving him vulnerable to positioning errors and requiring self-reliance in finale.
terrain_preference: Sustained high-altitude climbs suit best when in form. Exposed on technical descents (couldn't follow Froome downhill) and struggles with prolonged altitude efforts (dropped on Galibier). Positioning errors in valley approaches.
vulnerability: Poor positioning discipline in valleys/approaches (caught at back without teammates multiple times). Descending technical weakness. Cannot sustain pace when form is absent. Altitude struggles evident at extreme heights.
key_patterns: Operates isolated without teammates in critical GC moments across multiple Grand Tours (4+ observations)
Positioning errors in valley/flat sections before climbs cost significant time (24s yellow jersey loss)
Strong enough to drop Froome when in peak form, but form inconsistency evident across years
Tactical opportunism: attacked Froome's mechanical, defying unwritten rules for competitive advantage
Technical descending weakness: couldn't follow elite descenders even after successful climb attacks
Form trajectory unstable: 2017 podium contender, 2019 recovery mode, 2021 couldn't hold pace
form_trajectory: negative: 2021 observations show dropped by secondary riders (Mäder), retired mid-Vuelta. Declined from 2017 podium contender to struggling domestique-level by career end.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21
